data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Amazon's backend is built on a microservices architecture allowing independent development, deployment, and scaling.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Utilizing Amazon Web Services, the site leverages elastic cloud computing resources.

data.title: Data Replication and Storage
data.description: Data is stored across distributed databases with replication and redundancy protocols.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Automatic distribution of incoming application traffic across multiple resources.

data.title: Serverless Computing
data.description: Serverless functions handle operational tasks, improving scalability and cost efficiency.
